text.title: Workflow Spec Phase Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the workflow-spec-phase methodology end-to-end.

step.name: brainstorm
step.input: Feature intake note + roadmap context + named human owner.
step.action: Open-ended elicitation: who does this serve, what changes for them, what would success look like. Capture raw notes.
step.decision-gate: If no named human owner is available, emit skip-record and STOP.

step.name: research
step.action: Survey existing implementations, prior specs, constitution constraints. Cite ≥3 references.

step.name: clarify
step.action: Surface ambiguities as direct questions for the owner. Record every "I don't know" verbatim in an Open Questions list.
step.decision-gate: Open Questions remain visible in the spec; do NOT fabricate answers.

step.name: draft-fr-nfr
step.action: Author FR-N (functional) and NFR-N (non-functional) requirements with SHALL/MUST language. After each section, run a mini-check before advancing.
step.decision-gate: If any requirement uses soft language, rewrite before continuing.

step.name: scope-and-glossary
step.action: Author In-Scope list + ≥2 Out-of-Scope items + Success Criteria (measurable) + Glossary for ≥3 domain terms.
step.decision-gate: If Out-of-Scope < 2 OR Success Criteria are adjective-only, BLOCK draft completion.

step.name: emit-draft-and-flag-for-review
step.action: Assemble spec.md with `status: Draft`; surface "ready for owner review" flag. Do NOT promote to Accepted.
step.decision-gate: Agent NEVER sets status: Accepted; only the named human owner does.
